landing.heroTitle: From learning to hiring, without the guesswork.
landing.heroLede: FLTH connects what you know to what companies need — build a real profile, get matched to real roles, and see exactly what to learn next.
landing.searchNote: Job search is launching soon — start by creating your profile today.
landing.trustLabel: Trusted by teams building the next generation of talent
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need, nothing you don't.
landing.feature1Desc: Skills, education, experience, certificates and projects — structured once, used everywhere you apply.
landing.feature2Desc: Upload your CV once and keep it attached to your profile, ready for every application.
landing.feature3Desc: Bcrypt-hashed passwords, rotating JWT sessions, and account verification — your account, protected.
landing.stepsTitle: Three steps to a stronger job search.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up as a job seeker in under a minute and verify your email.
landing.step2Desc: Add your skills, education, experience, certificates and projects — plus your resume.
landing.step3Desc: Keep your profile sharp and let companies find exactly what they're looking for.
landing.ctaBandTitle: Ready to take the next step?
landing.ctaBandDesc: Create your free FLTH profile in minutes.

pricing.title: Simple pricing for candidates and companies.
pricing.subtitle: Job seekers are always free. Companies pay only when they're ready to hire.
pricing.freeDesc: Everything you need to get discovered.
pricing.roadmapNote: Company & billing features are on the roadmap — this pricing reflects the plan, not live checkout yet.

faq.title: Questions, answered.
faq.subtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out on the contact page.
faq.q1: Is FLTH free for job seekers?
faq.a1: Yes — creating a profile, uploading your resume, and applying through FLTH is completely free for job seekers.
faq.q2: How do I verify my email?
faq.a2: After registering, we send a verification link to your inbox. Click it, or use the resend option on the verify-email page if it didn't arrive.
faq.q3: What file types can I upload for my resume?
faq.a3: Resumes must be PDF files. Profile photos accept JPG, PNG, or WEBP. Both are limited by the size shown on the upload screen.
faq.a4: Yes — use "Forgot password" on the login page to receive a secure reset link by email.
faq.a5: Passwords are hashed with bcrypt, sessions use rotating JWT access & refresh tokens, and every upload is validated by its real file content, not just its extension.
faq.q6: Can companies see my information immediately?
faq.a6: Your profile becomes visible to companies once you've completed it — you stay in control of what you add.

about.title: Built to close the gap between learning and hiring.
about.p1: FLTH — From Learning To Hiring — exists because the traditional job search treats learning and hiring as two separate worlds. We think they should be one connected journey: know where you stand, know what to learn, know who's hiring for it.
about.p2: We built the platform around a single, structured candidate profile — skills, education, experience, certificates, and projects — so the work you put into your profile once pays off everywhere you apply.
about.missionText: To make the path from acquiring a skill to landing the role that needs it as short and as clear as possible — for every candidate, in every market we serve.
about.v1d: Structured profiles beat unstructured resumes — for you and for the companies reading them.
about.v2d: Your credentials and documents are protected with modern, industry-standard practices.
about.v3d: Full Arabic and English support, because opportunity shouldn't depend on which language you search in.

contact.title: We'd love to hear from you.
